ADHD Focus Timer

A fullscreen immersive focus tool designed for people with ADHD

Zero Punishment·Forward Timing·Full-screen Particles·Local Storage
Learn More

Philosophy

Remove everything unnecessary, let users focus on the task itself.

Minimal

No feature overload, every pixel has a reason to exist.

Immersive

Dark tones and restrained design reduce visual distraction and fatigue.

Practical

Tools should solve problems, not create new ones.
